description: Perform an image performance and Core Web Vitals audit on https://crawler-test.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Identify images that cause Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) due to missing size attributes and export them to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/missing_dimensions.csv. Identify heavy images impacting load time (over 100kb, or the largest images over 50kb if none exceed 100kb) and export them to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/heavy_images.csv. Create a summary report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/image_optimization_report.txt including issue counts and recommended fixes such as adding width and height attributes.
